## Blocking Automated Plan

- Run Godot parse: `GodotExe --headless --check-only project.godot`
- Run GUT scene runner: `GodotExe --headless res://tests/test_runner.tscn`
- Run packaged smoke: `builds/windows/SRPG.exe --headless --srpg-playthrough-smoke`
- Verify asset bundle behavior by checking packaged smoke stdout for `PACKAGED_PLAYTHROUGH_SMOKE PASS`.

## Manual / Advisory Plan

- `production/qa/evidence/sprint-002-presentation-p0.md` is implementation-complete but still says pending screenshots; treat that as superseded by `production/sprints/sprint-人工.md` rather than a Sprint-002 automation blocker.
- Credits in-game visibility is not a Sprint-002 closure gate after Sprint-005, but any public build must keep the legal attribution route covered by Sprint-005 tests.

## Definition of Done Evidence

- Lane A: ADR/control-manifest docs exist and remain internally consistent.
- Lane B: UI/font/audio assets are included in packaged smoke; subjective screenshots/listening are tracked externally.
- Lane C: Ch.2 GDD, branch docs, JSON skeletons, and epic entry exist.

## Next Steps

- Do not reopen Sprint-002 for human screenshot/listening gaps; work those through `MAN-001` and `MAN-006`.
- If a future release changes fonts/BGM/Credits, rerun packaged smoke and Sprint-005 credits tests together.
